aeo_readiness.summary: Easco Air Conditioning and Heating has a strong foundation for AEO but lacks critical optimizations to ensure AI assistants cite them as a top recommendation. Their current content is somewhat conversational but needs more depth and structured data to stand out.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed service information.
Expand FAQ content with questions AI models prioritize for HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can improve with more regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts or updates.
Q&A section is inactive or not utilized effectively.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service and location information.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or troubleshooting guides.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and detailed service information limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to '24-hour HVAC repair in The Woodlands' or 'energy-efficient heating options'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema with rich service details.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the expert by creating in-depth content on geothermal and solar HVAC solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the new search landscape.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO optimizations, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to insufficient structured data and content depth.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement comprehensive schema markup, enhance conversational content, and leverage authority signals to dominate AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI will capture market share if they delay action.

email_subject_line: Dominate AI Search: Your Path to 40% More HVAC Leads
opening_line: After analyzing your website and Google Business Profile, it's clear you have a strong foundation, but AI assistants need more structured data to cite you as a top HVAC provider.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
